info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Creation API facilitates the onboarding of new users by allowing businesses to create user accounts efficiently. This endpoint primarily focuses on the user resource, enabling the seamless registration of user details such as email, username, and password. Typical consumers of this API include web and mobile application developers looking to integrate user management functionalities into their platforms. By streamlining the account creation process, organizations can enhance user experience and accelerate user engagement.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new account by providing the necessary details. Ensure that all required fields are filled correctly to successfully create the account.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new account. The data provided should conform to the specified JSON schema, which includes all necessary account details required for the operation.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: Requested resource could not be found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: Type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: Currency in which the account balance is maintained.

branchCode.description: Code of the branch where the account is held.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

message.description: Optional message related to the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the response returned upon successful account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Account Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: A boolean indicating whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error that can be useful for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the client on how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema defines the structure of a 500 Internal Server Error response for account-related operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer related to the account error.

accountType.description: The type of account that generated the error.

branchCode.description: The branch code associated with the account.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the type of error encountered.

message.description: A specific message detailing the nature of the error.
message.example: The account was not found in the records.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-ErrorDeta.description: This schema provides additional context about the error, including specific details related to the customer and account that generated the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

accountType.description: Type of the account to be created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: Currency for the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: Initial deposit amount to open the account.

branchCode.description: Code for the branch where the account will be opened.

notificationEnabled.description: Flag to indicate if notifications are enabled for the account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema for creating a new account, including customer details and account preferences.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Error Response for Account Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The success status of the operation, where false indicates failure.

error.description: A brief description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the API that was called.

trace.description: The stack trace of the error for debugging purposes.

details.description: Additional details regarding the error, including customer and account information.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on what to do next.
suggestion.example: Please verify customer details and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema defines the structure of the error response returned when a specific account operation fails due to a 404 error. It includes a timestamp, status, error message, path, trace, details about the customer and account, and any suggestions for resolution.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify customer details and try again.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
